title: Show HN: Termcraft – terminal-first 2D sandbox survival in Rust
description: I’ve been building termcraft, a terminal-first 2D sandbox survival game in Rust. The idea is to take the classic early survival progression and adapt it to a side-on terminal format instead of a tile or pixel-art engine.
